Trump will ring the NYSE bell next week from the oval office.

The first and only other time he rang the NYSE bell was on Dec 12th 2024.

The $SPY dropped .52% that day.

The $QQQ dropped .65% that day.

Extrapolate how you see fit.

tweets.text:
Strait of Hormuz over the last 24 hours.

Just a quick cheat guide: any tanker ending with "prosperity" or "b" will be used for ship-to-ship transfers via the Oman lane under US escorts.

VLCC inbound tanker flow, excluding Iran, is around 4 a day right now, or 8 million b/d.

Most of the inbound tankers using the Iran route are limited to Iranian flows and products. 

I have included the video from @MarineTraffic and the last two days for reference.

thread_tweets.text:
deposited another 7.7k and did a little more ripping

two epics off the $100 packs was nice screenshot 

added everything after the sylveon in the second pic, if I were to sell everything back at current offers I'd get $6950~, so could say I am down $750 for 50k or so points

but I'm going to hold them and sell later (hopefully when price goes up)

basically look at it as pokemon card exposure with cards I like while hoping these points turn into some type of future reward

so ripping gachas gives similar dopamine to a pack, but with significantly better EV

basically look at it as pokemon card exposure with cards I like while hoping these points turn into some type of future reward

if I were to spend 7.7k on packs instead of a gacha platform, I'd expect to get back $1000 of cards with my luck, if not less 🤣

so ripping gachas gives similar dopamine to a pack, but with significantly better EV

also important to note if I was strictly point maxing I would only farm the $50 pack and sell everything back, but that isn't fun 

the $1250 pack has a psa 10 1st ed shining charizard among others https://t.co/VPk697bYmF

@NEZtakes we are due
